Title: let's patch the gpu monitor to track real gpu telemetry.
Project: lets_patch_the_gpu_monitor_to_track_real_gpu_telemetry
Anchor: scratch

- [ ] Prepare project root | ensure_dir . | verify: dir_exists .
- [ ] Implement Python entrypoint | write_file main.py | contents_b64:  | verify: contains main.py def main
- [ ] Write project contract | write_file ProjectSpec.json | contents_b64:  | verify: contains ProjectSpec.json chattyfactory.project_spec.v1
- [ ] Run deterministic self-test | run py -3 main.py --self-test | verify: stdout_contains CF_OK
- [ ] Acceptance: help | run py -3 main.py --help | verify: exists main.py | verify: output_contains usage:
